notes.text: Food & property photography lightboxes get in-section image navigation: next/prev arrow buttons on desktop (+ keyboard Left/Right, + Esc to close), swipe left/right on mobile (arrows hidden on mobile). Order = curated photos[] order, no wrap-around, scoped to the single section.
Open for planning: (1) shared GalleryGrid file location e.g. app/components/GalleryGrid.tsx; (2) should swipe-down close the lightbox on mobile; (3) arrow button visual styling/placement.

payload.context: Discuss handoff: gallery in-section navigation feature shaped, ready for /plan
